channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Corbyn to be Your Party parliamentary leader as Sultana joins leadership committee
item.description: Former Labour leader says time for ‘real work’ to begin as his candidates take 14 of 24 available places on executive committee UK politics live – lat...

item.title: Hillary Clinton to testify in House oversight committee’s Epstein investigation – US politics live
item.description: Deposition will be filmed but take place behind closed doors, with former president Bill Clinton scheduled to answer questions tomorrow Sign up for th...

item.title: Iran says agreement with US ‘within reach’ as nuclear talks begin in Geneva – Middle East live
item.description: The Oman-mediated discussions take place amid a massive buildup of US warships and aircraft in the Middle East The nuclear talks today are the third b...

item.title: Denmark’s Mette Frederiksen calls March election amid ‘Greenland bounce’ in polls – Europe live
item.description: ‘It will soon be spring – and the Danes will soon be going to the polls,’ Danish PM tells the parliament in a special statement Nordic correspondent F...

item.title: Labour, Green Party and Reform make final pitch to voters in Gorton and Denton – UK politics live
item.description: Labour has focused its efforts at voters who may be tempted to back the Reform candidate in the by-election The number of asylum seekers being housed ...

item.title: Tracey Emin says her artwork My Bed would be 'tidy, clean and boring' if she made it today
item.description: Her Turner Prize-nominated messy bed caused a stir in the late 1990s and is now going back on display.

item.title: Traitor Rachel on winning the show, her mum's death - and what's next
item.description: Rachel Duffy has spoken publicly for the first time about winning The Traitors and then losing her mother.

item.title: England consider spinner Ahmed for Colombo turner
item.description: England will consider leg-spinner Rehan Ahmed for Friday's T20 World Cup match against New Zealand with spinning conditions expected.

item.title: Soham murderer Ian Huntley seriously injured in prison attack
item.description: The 52-year-old is serving a life sentence after being convicted of murdering schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman.

item.title: Woman angry at lack of prosecution after she fell from window fleeing triple killer
item.description: A former neighbour of Valdo Calocane was told he could have killed her, years before the attacks.
